onboard: Remote-only DIY: With a working programmed key, cycle ignition ON→OFF 4 times (each ON/OFF within 5 seconds); on 4th cycle door locks cycle confirming programming mode; press LOCK on remote to store (up to 3 remotes); turn ignition OFF. NOTE: this programs the REMOTE ONLY — transponder chip requires professional programmer.
addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or VVDI2) to OBD port under dash left of steering column. Navigate IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Blade key → Immobilizer(Honda) → Key → Reset Key. Insert existing working key, turn ignition ON, confirm 4th-gen immobilizer, enter number of keys to reset. Follow ignition on/off cycling prompts (off→on, off within 20s, on with new key within 20s, off within 20s, on with original key within 20s, off→on to verify). Chip is ID46 PCF7936 — clonable if needed.
allKeysLost: Use Honda HDS + HIM via OBD or Autel IM608/KM100. HDS path: IMMO → Immobilizer Setup → Add and Delete Keys → All Key Lost; system prompts for PCM/immobilizer PIN. PIN obtained via: OBD read with Autel IM608 (preferred), dealer inquiry by VIN ($20–$100), or EEPROM read. After PIN entry, follow ignition-cycle prompts (off→on→off within 16s→on within 20s cycles). No security wait reported.
pinSource: OBD read | PIN by VIN | dealer | EEPROM
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 with Honda IMMO adapter, or Honda HDS + HIM interface

onboard: Remote-only DIY: With a working programmed key, cycle ignition ON→OFF 4 times (each ON/OFF within 5 seconds); on 4th cycle door locks cycle confirming programming mode; press LOCK on remote to store (up to 3 remotes); turn ignition OFF. NOTE: this programs the REMOTE ONLY — transponder chip requires professional programmer.
addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or VVDI2) to OBD port. Navigate IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Blade key → Immobilizer(Honda) → Key → Reset Key. Insert existing working key, turn ignition ON, confirm immobilizer generation, enter number of keys. Follow ignition on/off cycling prompts as directed by tool. ID46 PCF7936 chip — can also be cloned from original if available.
allKeysLost: Use Autel IM608/KM100 or Honda HDS + HIM via OBD. PIN required — obtain via OBD read, dealer by VIN, or EEPROM. HDS path: IMMO → Immobilizer Setup → Add and Delete Keys → All Key Lost; enter PIN; follow ignition-cycle prompts. Chip and remote programmed separately.
pinSource: OBD read | PIN by VIN | dealer | EEPROM
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 with Honda IMMO, or Honda HDS + HIM interface

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or VVDI2) to OBD port. Navigate IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key (or Remote Head) → Push to start or turn-key → Keyless system(Honda) → Add key (guided). Present existing working key on dash/inside vehicle when prompted; follow ignition cycle prompts. Chip is ID47 PCF7961X (Hitag3) — requires token or specialized programmer; do not attempt clone.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 Pro II to OBD. Generate universal smart key via XP400 Pro: Universal key → North America → Honda → Accord → 2013 → Generate. Then IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key → Push to start → Keyless system(Honda) → All keys lost. Follow ignition-cycle prompts; no PIN required for OBD-based AKL on Hitag3 systems.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 with Honda HISEC update, or Xhorse VVDI2

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or VVDI2) to OBD port. Navigate IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Remote Head → Keyless system(Honda) → Add key (guided). Present existing working key when prompted; follow ignition cycle prompts. ID47/Honda G Chip (Hitag3) — requires token programmer.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 (or IM508/VVDI2) to OBD. Generate universal key for model year. Then IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Remote Head → Keyless system(Honda) → All keys lost. Follow ignition-cycle prompts. No PIN required for OBD-based AKL on Hitag3.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 with Honda HISEC update, or Xhorse VVDI2

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 Pro II + JVCI to OBD port. Navigate IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key → Push to start → Keyless system(Honda) → Add key (guided). Disable nav/audio; close doors/windows. Insert existing key when prompted, press Start twice to confirm ignition. Follow prompts to register new key. HITAG AES (4A chip) — cloning not possible.
allKeysLost: Generate universal smart key on XP400 Pro: Universal key → North America → Honda → Accord → 2018 → Honda Accord 2018-2022 → Generate. Then IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key → Push to start → Keyless system(Honda) → All keys lost. Hold Start button until ignition activates; ensure no DTCs; close all openings; place new key inside vehicle; remove others >5m away. Follow ignition cycling prompts; specify key quantity.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro II with JVCI and XP400 Pro (Honda HISEC update required)

addKey: CAUTION: BCM brick risk with aftermarket tools on 2022+ Accord. Strongly preferred: Honda i-HDS + HIM via OBD. HDS path: IMMO → Immobilizer Setup → Add and Delete Keys → Add 1 Key → Begin to Add 1 Key; follow prompts. If using Autel IM608 Pro II, select 'before 2020' when tool asks about system generation to avoid BCM corruption — then IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key → Keyless system(Honda) → Add key.
allKeysLost: Honda i-HDS + HIM preferred (dealer tool). Autel IM608 Pro II viable but requires caution: generate universal key on XP400 Pro, then IMMO → Honda → Manual selection → Accord → Smart key → All keys lost; when tool asks if vehicle is 2020+, select NO regardless of actual year to avoid BCM brick. Place key inside, follow ignition-cycle prompts. HITAG AES 4A chip — no cloning.
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column

allKeysLost: Use Autel IM608 with Honda IMMO support (8E variant supported). Connect to OBD; select Fit, verify year/chip type. For Megamos 8E: use programmer-guided AKL procedure (no cloning; full ECU communication required). For ID46 variant: standard Honda HDS/IMMO PIN-based AKL. PIN via OBD read or dealer by VIN.

onboard: Remote-only DIY (flip key remote portion only): With a working programmed key in ignition, cycle ignition ON→OFF 4 times (each within 5 seconds); door locks cycle on 4th cycle; press LOCK on flip remote to store; turn ignition OFF. Programs REMOTE ONLY — transponder chip (ID46 PCF7936) requires professional programmer.

allKeysLost: Use Autel IM608/KM100 or Honda HDS + HIM. PIN required — obtain via OBD read, dealer by VIN, or EEPROM. HISS reset and programming of new keys from VIN: HDS path IMMO → Immobilizer Setup → All Key Lost; enter PIN; follow ignition-cycle prompts. Typical time 45–75 min.
